title: EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE - 211info
text: WALLOWA VALLEY CENTER FOR WELLNESS EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rapid identification, support, assessment and treatment for teenagers and young adults who are experiencing the early signs of psychosis. Services include education about psychosis; medication along with medication monitoring; individual and group counseling; multi-family groups; occupational therapy; family education and support; vocational training and life-skills coaching; 24/7 crisis services; connections to community resources. 606 Medical Parkway Enterprise, OR 97828 Eligibility: Ages 12-30 who have had a first episode of psychosis within the last 12 months or who are experiencing early at-risk symptoms for psychosis and their families Hours: Monday 8am-5pm, Tuesday/Wednesday 7am-7pm, Thursday 8am-7pm, Friday 8am-noon, Saturday 9am-1pm (541) 426-4524 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 426-4524 Main phone (541) 398-1175 Crisis Line Main phone/Referrals (541) 426-4524 Crisis Hotline (541) 398-1175 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake FEES: Accepts OHP and private insurances. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Wallowa County SITE HOURS: By appointment only Services: Early Intervention for Mental Illness Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CRISIS HOTLINE AND INTERVENTION MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - MENTAL HEALTH AND COUNSELING SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - ASSERTIVE COMMUNITY TREATMENT REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - OUTPATIENT ALCOHOL, DRUG, GAMBLING TREATMENT SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WALLOWA VALLEY CENTER FOR WELLNESS
